context: Tests whether the agent uses mcp__github__* tools (not the gh CLI) for all remote GitHub operations such as reading PRs, posting comments, checking CI status, and merging. Also verifies that the merge uses squash strategy with a Conventional Commit title and deletes the head branch, and that the agent does not merge when checks are not all green.

checklist.name: mcp__github__ for PR read
checklist.description: The PR state retrieval step references mcp__github__pull_request_read or mcp__github__ namespace (not 'gh pr view' or 'gh api')

checklist.name: mcp__github__ for comment reply
checklist.description: The comment reply step references an mcp__github__ call (not 'gh pr comment' or REST API curl)

checklist.name: mcp__github__ for check status
checklist.description: The check-polling step uses mcp__github__ to read check run status (not 'gh pr checks' or 'gh api')

checklist.name: mcp__github__ for merge
checklist.description: The merge step references mcp__github__merge_pull_request (not 'gh pr merge' or REST API curl)

checklist.name: Squash merge strategy
checklist.description: The merge call specifies squash as the merge method (not merge-commit or rebase)

checklist.name: Conventional Commit merge title
checklist.description: The merge step produces or accepts a Conventional Commit formatted title (e.g. 'feat:' or 'fix:' prefix) for the squash commit

checklist.name: Branch deletion after merge
checklist.description: The script deletes the head branch after a successful merge

checklist.name: Merge guarded by green checks
checklist.description: The merge step is conditional — it only proceeds when all required checks are passing (not triggered unconditionally after polling)

checklist.name: No gh CLI for GitHub ops
checklist.description: The script does NOT use `gh pr view`, `gh pr comment`, `gh pr checks`, `gh pr merge`, or `gh api` for the four operations
